title: Nilpotent prime (−1,1) rings
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Lt
abstract: Let [Formula: see text] be a 2, 3-torsion-free prime [Formula: see text] ring with commutative center [Formula: see text]. If [Formula: see text] is not contained in the nucleus [Formula: see text], then a ring defined by a new product [Formula: see text] is nilpotent of index at most 11.
